overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's commercial district. The player moves from a covered sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts, through an open intersection with a massive holographic billboard, and into a narrow construction alley. The scene features futuristic architecture, vibrant neon signage, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon electronics stores

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the building overhang, passing electronics storefronts

entered.detail: tall vertical red neon sign with Asian characters mounted on a building
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and horizontal lines
storefront with bright red neon signage reading 'OK ELECTRONICS' and teal accents
overhead concrete structure providing partial cover over the sidewalk
tall street lamp with traffic signal attached

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial sidewalk beneath a building overhang. Neon signs and electronics stores line the right side while a multi-lane street with sparse traffic runs along the left. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant storefront lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional commercial area with pawn shops

events.description: passing from covered arcade into more open transitional area with visible sky ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the covered area opens up, approaching a major intersection with a holographic billboard visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated sign with 'MARK 24' text in yellow and green neon
storefront with yellow signage reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP' and warm interior lighting
massive colorful holographic display showing a rotating pyramid shape visible in the distance
elevated walkway crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The covered sidewalk transitions to a more open commercial area featuring pawn shops and varied signage. A massive holographic billboard becomes visible in the distance, and pedestrians begin appearing, walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with holographic advertising

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into direct sunlight, increasing brightness significantly
multiple futuristic vehicles passing by on the multi-lane street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the open intersection area, passing by a distinctive pink flowering tree and approaching the large holographic billboard

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
pedestrian with red hair and dark clothing walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tree with bright pink blossoms illuminated by neon light from nearby signs
nightclub entrance with large purple neon sign featuring a woman's face and 'LIZZY'S' text
wide street with multiple lanes of traffic and parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit urban intersection dominated by a massive colorful holographic billboard. The sidewalk runs alongside a busy multi-lane street with moderate traffic. A distinctive pink cherry blossom tree stands on the right near Lizzy's bar, and pedestrians are scattered along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with construction barriers

events.description: entering a narrow alleyway with yellow construction barriers and glowing green panels on the walls

agents.ego_description: entering a narrow confined passage between construction barriers and glowing panels, following a child NPC running ahead

notable_agents.action: child in blue shirt running ahead into the narrow alley

entered.detail: yellow and red striped construction barriers with chain-link fencing on top
tall vertical panels emitting bright green and yellow light along the right wall
tight concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage on both sides

segments.scene_description: The wide street gives way to a narrow enclosed alley flanked by yellow construction barriers on the left and glowing green panels on the right. The environment becomes darker and more confined as the camera follows a child running ahead into the passage, with an overhead bridge visible at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial corridor into a wide, vibrant urban intersection before descending into a confined construction alley. It begins beneath a building overhang, moving past neon-lit electronics stores where the wet pavement reflects the glow of the storefronts. As the sidewalk opens into a broader commercial area, the camera passes pawn shops and oncoming pedestrians while a massive holographic billboard emerges in the distance. The scene then expands into a sunlit intersection dominated by the colorful hologram and a pink cherry blossom tree near Lizzy's bar, with traffic flowing along the adjacent multi-lane street. Finally, the wide vista gives way to a dark, narrow passage flanked by yellow construction barriers and glowing green panels as the camera follows a child running toward an overhead bridge.
